name: test_baseline_registered_substantively
command: python -c "import json; b = json.load(open('artifacts/harness/test-baseline.json')); failures = b.get('baseline_failures', []); assert len(failures) >= 10; assert all(f.get('failure_reason', 'unknown') != 'unknown' for f in failures), 'some failures lack substantive reasons'; print('ok')"

name: baseline_helper_works
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import baseline_regression_check, run_check; r = run_check(baseline_regression_check()); print('passed=' + str(r.passed))"

name: operating_stance_in_agent_instructions
command: grep -l "objective and skeptical" GEMINI-iteration.md CLAUDE-iteration.md | wc -l

name: three_gotchas_registered
command: jq -r ".gotchas[] | select(.id | test(\"G07[9]|G080|G081\")) | .id" data/gotcha_archive.json | sort | tr '\n' ' '

name: no_new_regressions_beyond_baseline
command: python -c "from aho.acceptance import baseline_regression_check, run_check; r = run_check(baseline_regression_check()); print(r.actual_output if not r.passed else 'baseline-stable')"
